title: myosotis palustris var. oraria
intro: Myosotis palustris var. oraria, also known as marsh forget-me-not, is a variant of the forget-me-not plant that grows in wetland environments. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of marsh forget-me-not include reducing inflammation and pain, treating urinary issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of marsh forget-me-not can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional herbal medicine to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections.
